file-name-snake-case.note: DEAD RULE — count equals every PascalCase component + camelCase module in src/** (the project's real convention), so it grows with the codebase. Bump to match HEAD when adding convention-following files; NEVER rename a file to satisfy it. Retired in Phase 5 in favor of @typescript-eslint/naming-convention. 1431->1447: +2 circleFaceDetect (F360 joint-pick, camelCase follows core/geometry convention), +14 kebab-case browser test helpers carried in by 3ccb3485. 1447->1449: +2 sourceCodeEditorStartupPrewarm{,.test} (Monaco startup idle prewarm, camelCase mirrors usdRuntimeStartupPrewarm). 1449->1453: current HEAD/file-name drift plus +2 fusionRotateKnob{,.test} (unified-transform-controls camelCase convention). 1453->1457: +4 fusionRotateGeometry/fusionTranslatePlane helpers and tests requested for the Fusion gizmo redesign. 1457->1459: +2 textureLoaderHandlers{,.test} (core/loaders TGA/HDR texture-decoder factory, camelCase follows core/loaders convention).

file-too-long.note: src/** files over 800 code lines (blank/comment lines skipped). Ratchet down as Phase 3 splits land; never raise. 50->49 when meshLoader.ts shed its asset path-index engine to assetPathIndex.ts.

function-too-long.note: Function bodies over 200 code lines in src/**. Ratchet down only. 115->116: one over-long function carried in by the 3ccb3485 app-routing split (grandfathered until that split is refactored); the F360 joint-pick work added none — circleFaceDetect.ts and jointSnapResolver.ts functions all stay under 200 lines.

function-too-complex.note: Cyclomatic complexity over 20 in src/**. Parser/solver heavy; ratchet down only.

too-many-params.note: Functions with more than 4 params in src/**. Prefer an options object; ratchet down only.

too-deep.note: Block nesting deeper than 4 in src/**. Ratchet down only.

nullable-undefined-type-alias.note: Historical top-level type aliases with null or undefined unions.

dynamic-code-execution.note: Historical browser test helper callbacks using new Function.

css-important.note: Historical Tailwind utility font-size overrides and scrollbar styling.

css-declaration-order.note: Historical CSS declaration ordering differences; Google marks alphabetical order optional.
